title: MOSSEL BAY FIRE UPDATE: More evacuations take place in Aalwyndal
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Flare-ups in fire in the...
bodyText:
MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Flare-ups in fire in the Aalwyndal area have necessitated further evacuations. This according to the Mossel Bay Municipality’s most recent fire update at 15:00 this afternoon, 7 January.


> The municipality said active multi-agency firefighting continues in Aalwyndal and surrounds, with crews attending to regular flare-ups.


It said resources are being used strategically to manage flare-ups and that wind gusts and inaccessible terrain are complicating the containment of the fire.

“Aerial firefighting resources are still deployed, strengthening containment efforts.

“One injury (civilian – female minor) has been reported in Vakansieplaas.”

Additional resources that have been volunteered include concrete mixers with articulated arms to aid firefighting operations and a grader to assist with firebreaks.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
